channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Ruby Shrub
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a gorgeous drink.

Duration: 03:56

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, non-alcoholic, mocktails, DIY

item.title: Hot Buttered Rum
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a rich and creamy drink.

Duration: 03:12

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Won a Stand-Off with a Popstar?
item.description:
Raph, Chris, Carolyn, and Alexis drink hot buttered rum and give off big leader energy.

Duration: 47:41

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, raphael chestang, chris grace, carolyn page, alexis rhiannon

item.title: Three Dots and a Dash
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink that's nothing but good vibes.

Duration: 03:05

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Passed Out at a Movie Theater?
item.description:
Ryan, Steven, Shane, and Selorm from Watcher drink Three Dots and a Dash and talk like cavemen.

Duration: 46:53

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, ryan bergara, shane madej, steven lim, selorm kploanyi, watcher entertainment
